svg.title: Plausible homepage structure before and after
svg.desc: A comparison of the old and new homepage order. The old order placed long prose before the feature grid. The new order moves the feature grid directly after the hero.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: Same design, same components. A clearer order of information.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: Visitors had to read before they could scan.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: Visitors can scan product value first.
